title: Test subtask creation
description: Verify that subtasks work with beads backend

title: Test beads task creation (IN PROGRESS)
description: Creating a test task to verify beads_rust backend integration works correctly

comments.author: GitHub CI
comments.text:
Beads task manager testing completed successfully. All operations verified:
- task_create: Creates tasks with ID, title, description, priority, statuses
- task_get: Retrieves task details including subtaskCount
- task_list: Filters tasks by status correctly
- task_update: Updates title, status, and other fields
- task_output: Records output/results to tasks
- Persistence: Tasks backed by beads_rust (SQLite) persist correctly in .beads/ directory
